style: Architectural minimal product illustration, obsidian background, fine white linework, subtle violet and cyan accents, premium editorial mood, no people, no text, no photorealism.

images.prompt: Interlocking forms, terminal rails, and agent nodes arranged as one calm system with generous negative space.
Blueprint-like Node client architecture turning structured fields into encrypted storage objects with quiet signal paths.
Architectural command line workflow with YAML sheets feeding a terminal and resolving into a published form lattice.
Diagrammatic agent orchestration scene with tool nodes, response channels, and one central Scrolls memory structure.
Architectural workflow board showing feedback loops, export pipelines, and survey flows as elegant connected modules.
